evals.prompt: Generate architecture-rules.mdc for this Laravel + React monorepo. Product is under apps/billing-api/ with backend/ and frontend/.
evals.expected_output: Agent scans manifests and layout, drafts lean alwaysApply rule at apps/billing-api/.cursor/rules/architecture-rules.mdc with stack table, layout, test commands, no business spec content.

evals.prompt: Our architecture-rules.mdc is outdated after we moved modules to app/Modules/. Refresh it — keep the Portuguese communication bullet.
evals.expected_output: Agent refreshes in place, updates module layout from code, preserves hand-edited communication rule, stays under ~200 lines.

evals.prompt: Bootstrap agent context for a legacy PHP repo that uses ns-util. No architecture-rules yet but we have docs/specs/.
evals.expected_output: Agent generates constitution, detects NsUtil, links to nsutil-architecture-rules.mdc instead of inlining, points specs to docs/specs/.
